title: 2025-10-10 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 24.20
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2025-10-10: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 24.20/100, signaling a low pressure regime as equity stress and volatility shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2025-10-10, the score printed 24.20/100 in the low regime, with equity stress and volatility doing most of the work.
